name: the router auto-attaches the architectural-content bundle for a prose-applicable rule
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title 'ADR' --prose 'design decision recorded as an architecture decision record' --json > c.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c.json --json > r.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'bundle=true' e.txt && node -e 'const r=require(process.cwd()+"/r.json").enforced_by;if(!r.some(x=>x.bundle==="architectural-content"))process.exit(1)' && echo bundle-attached 1>&2
